title: The Scout Mindset
subtitle: Why Some People See Things Clearly and Others Don't
author: Julia Galef
themes: Rethinking the Value of Being Wrong
excerpt: Most of us think our beliefs are the product of clear-eyed reasoning. They aren't. We're driven by a 'soldier mindset' — defending what we want to believe and attacking what threatens it. Julia Galef shows us a better way: the scout mindset, where the goal isn't to win arguments but to see reality as clearly as possible — even when it hurts.
